bug_description: Login failure after entering valid credentials on the web app.
logs: Authentication failed: invalid session token returned by identity service
screenshot_notes: User is redirected back to the login screen with an error banner
additional_comments: Reported by multiple users during morning peak traffic

bug_description: Checkout payment failure when submitting a card payment for an order.
logs: Payment gateway timeout: 504 Gateway Timeout at /checkout/confirm
screenshot_notes: Order summary shows a pending payment state and no confirmation page
additional_comments: Customers are unable to complete purchases

bug_description: Password reset email link does not work for newly registered users.
logs: Reset token validation error: link expired before use
screenshot_notes: Password reset page shows an expired link message

bug_description: Search results page is slow and times out for common product queries.
logs: Search query exceeded 15 seconds and returned a timeout exception
screenshot_notes: Spinner remains active and the page eventually shows an error state
additional_comments: Performance regression noticed after search index update

bug_description: Profile save error when updating email and phone number.
logs: Validation error: profile update request failed with 500 Internal Server Error
screenshot_notes: Save button stays enabled while a red error message appears
